text:
Mars give results only
when they transit the first decanate of a sign; Venus and
Jupiter show their effects only when they are in the second
decanate; and Moon and Saturn have their influence as they
pass through the third decanate.
Apart from the usual rules enumerated by many an au
thority, there are a few principles to be remembered. If the
malefic planets transit in 1, 3, 5, 7, 10, 19, 23 stars from the
asterism at birth, there will be some trouble or danger. If a
planet transits from one sign to another on a day having 1, 10
or 19 asterism from that of the birth, or if there is an eclipse or
planetary war in any one of these asterisms, it forebodes some
calamity. But if these planets are aspected by a benefic, or if
they have the conjunction of a benefic, the evil is greatly
minimised. Similarly if the signs having these asterisms are
transitted by malefics who are the owners of these signs, then
too there can be no evil effects.
